label: Transparent lyrebird tail motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lyrebird transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated lyrebird tail motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined lyrebird tail motif: elegant fan of brown feather filaments and two silver lyre-shaped tail plumes, subtle moss-green rainforest undertones, precise feather barbs, warm umber base feathers, cool silver highlights, crisp silhouette edges, premium elegant media-system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full lyrebird tail silhouette without cropping; no bird body, no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving brown feather texture, silver tail arcs, moss accents, and fine plume detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no rainforest scene, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Lyrebird" / "Lyrebird" using the motif of a lyrebird tail in a temperate rainforest.
Visual identity: elegant media system, warm brown feather editorial surfaces, silver lyre-tail arcs as fine linework, moss-green rainforest accents, pearl-silver dividers, bark-umber text, misty off-white backgrounds, quiet high-end publishing and media-dashboard polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, media cards, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, elegant feather-rule dividers, lyre-tail arc highlights, compact media cards, moss active states, silver focus rings, rainforest-neutral borders, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Media Queue, Signal, Status, Form, Table, Reach, Conversion, Active, Draft.
Palette names visible: Rainforest Parchment #f5f1e8, Feather Umber #7a4a27, Tail Silver #c8c8bd, Moss Velvet #657a3f, Bark Ink #2c2119, Canopy Mist #d9ddcf, Warm Taupe #a98663, Fern Focus #8ca45f, Deep Loam #1d1712, Pearl Line #e6e1d4.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no full animal body, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
